item.title: R to @WuBlockchain: CoinGecko data shows that Upbit, South Korea’s largest crypto exchange, recorded approximately $4.23 billion in trading volume over the past 24 hours, up 550.3%. Bithumb, the count
item.description: pCoinGecko data shows that Upbit, South Korea’s largest crypto exchange, recorded approximately $4.23 billion in trading volume over the past 24 hours, up 550.3%. Bithumb, the country’s second-largest crypto exchange, recorded approximately $785 million, up 324.4%./p

item.title: RT by @nono2357: 👉Depuis le 1er janvier 2026, #DAC8 oblige chaque plateforme crypto de l'UE à transmettre au fisc votre identité complète, votre adresse, et le détail de vos transactions. Ces données
item.description: p👉Depuis le 1er janvier 2026, a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23DAC8"#DAC8/a oblige chaque plateforme crypto de l'UE à transmettre au fisc votre identité complète, votre adresse, et le détail de vos transactions. Ces données atterrissent ensuite dans une base partagée entre 27 admi

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $197 Million in Weekly Net Inflows, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streak From July 6 to 10 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $197 million in net inflows, ending an eight-week
item.description: pSpot Bitcoin ETFs Record $197 Million in Weekly Net Inflows, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streakbr /br /From July 6 to 10 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $197 million in net inflows, ending an eight-week outflow streak. Spot Ethereum ETFs saw $84.42 million in net inflows, also ending eight cons

item.title: American Bitcoin, Co-Founded by Eric Trump, Plunges More Than 95% From Peak Bloomberg reported that American Bitcoin shares have fallen over 95% from their peak, wiping more than $600 million from the
item.description: pAmerican Bitcoin, Co-Founded by Eric Trump, Plunges More Than 95% From Peakbr /br /Bloomberg reported that American Bitcoin shares have fallen over 95% from their peak, wiping more than $600 million from the value of Eric Trump’s roughly 6% stake over the past 10 months. item.title: A Bitcoin OG who had been dormant for 7 years transferred all 2,931 $BTC($188.03M) to a new wallet 3 hours ago. The OG received 2,931 $BTC 7 years ago when $BTC was trading at $6,513 and hadn't moved

item.title: RT by @nono2357: DAC8 schafft ab 2026 eine zentrale Datenbank: Wer besitzt wie viel Bitcoin, wann gekauft, wann verkauft. Man muss kein Pessimist sein, um zu wissen, was mit solchen Daten passiert: 20

item.title: RT by @zachxbt: Update 3: Over the past 48 hours an entity initially funded by the LAB team deposited 18.4M LAB ($18.3M) to Aster and began selling LAB spot on the DEX which has caused the LAB price t
item.description: pUpdate 3: Over the past 48 hours an entity initially funded by the LAB team deposited 18.4M LAB ($18.3M) to Aster and began selling LAB spot on the DEX which has caused the LAB price to drop another -54% from $1.2 to $0.55.br /br /From July 10 to 11 the entity began transferring LAB to three Aster

item.title: Adam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoin Blockstream co-founder and Hashcash inventor Adam Back and Strategy founder Michael Saylor both opposed implementing BIP 110 on the Bitcoin netwo
item.description: pAdam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoinbr /br /Blockstream co-founder and Hashcash inventor Adam Back and Strategy founder Michael Saylor both opposed implementing BIP 110 on the Bitcoin network. Back said BIP 110 attempts to police other people’s transactions and conflicts with Bitc

item.title: Just In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit Hedera-based lending protocol Bonzo Lend disclosed that it lost approximately $9.05 million in an oracle exploit. Bonzo sai
item.description: pJust In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploitbr /br /Hedera-based lending protocol Bonzo Lend disclosed that it lost approximately $9.05 million in an oracle exploit. Bonzo said a flaw in Supra’s signature verification allowed an attacker to manipulate SAUCE prices an

item.title: A Solana OG had 181K $SOL($14.2M) stolen. The thief sold all 181K $SOL, bridged the funds to #Ethereum, and swapped them for 7,918 $ETH($14.2M). According to @zachxbt. https://arkm.com/explorer/addres
item.description: pA Solana OG had 181K a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23SOL"$SOL/a($14.2M) stolen.br /br /The thief sold all 181K a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23SOL"$SOL/a, bridged the funds to a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23Ethereum"#Ethereum/a, and swapp

item.title: Polymarket Applies for US License to Offer Margin Trading
item.description: The filing would let Polymarket users open positions without posting full collateral, following Kalshi's FCM-backed perpetuals launch.
